productDisplayName: Nike Men As Ss Cruiser Maroon T-Shirts
description: Composition Maroon round neck t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has short sleeves, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline, graphic print on the chest, and is engineered with Dri-Fit technology Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean The nike Cruiser Tree Dude men's running t-shirt features a fitted design for reduced bulk and sweat-wicking fabric for a distraction-free run. This men's running tee won't weigh you down. The lightweight, fitted design and set-in short sleeves provide a non-restrictive fit and great range of motion. And the seam on the ribbed crew-neck is reinforced for long-wearing comfort. The nike Cruiser Tree Dude Men's T-shirt features Dri-FIT cotton for a soft feel that helps keep you dry and comfortable. It wicks sweat away from the skin to the fabric's surface, where it quickly evaporates.
